title: Item Indicator
description: This mod shows detail information of some items.
body:
# 🛠️ ItemIndicator: Elevate Your Minecraft Inventory Experience

**ItemIndicator** is not just another mod—it's your ultimate tool for streamlined inventory management in Minecraft. Say goodbye to the hassle of manually inspecting every item. With **ItemIndicator**, all the essential information is presented at a glance, making your gameplay smoother and more enjoyable.

## 🌟 Key Features

### 🧰 Shulker Box Indicator
Effortlessly monitor the contents of your Shulker Boxes. Never lose track of your stored treasures again—our intuitive visual indicators keep you informed without ever opening a box.

![Elegant Shulker Box Indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/640b06f7f31774912bf912d1879006d0ab568b6a.png)

### 🐝 Bee Hive & Bee Nest Indicator
Keep an eye on your buzzing friends with ease. **ItemIndicator** provides a clear, instant readout of bee activity and honey levels, ensuring you're always in the know.

![Detailed Bee Hive & Bee Nest Indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4ce991af49de2962ae46b7e4a7822fd4c1c7687.png)

### ✨ Enchantment Indicator
you can easily see which tools have the Silk Touch or Fortune enchantments applied. No more guesswork—enchantment icons are displayed directly on the items, allowing you to quickly assess their capabilities at a glance.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21354c0547b17f6c59ccdb348d131a12d340fba3.png)

### 💡 Ominous Bottle & Firework Rocket Level Indicator
Keep track of your ominous potions and rocket level at a glance. Instantly see how many ominous potions remain in each bottle and the remaining flight levels of your Firework Rockets, ensuring you're always prepared for any adventure.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa74f994de2ca86deba0bff1b1ba2cbf7e6b3309.png)

### 🛡️ Waxed Icon Indicator
Stay informed about your copper blocks at a glance! The Waxed Icon Indicator visually distinguishes between waxed and unwaxed copper blocks, so you'll always know which blocks are protected from oxidization. Perfect for builders and collectors alike, this feature ensures your creations stay pristine.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac100c2cd8161325d9b2c24b611055458084e5ac.png)

### 🧪 Potion Effect Indicator
Easily identify the effects of your potions with the Potion Effect Indicator. Whether it's a splash potion, lingering potion, or a drinkable one, this feature highlights the potion's primary effect with clear icons. Never guess your potion's power or purpose again—see it all at a glance and use your potions with precision.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9e7c7384a2160ced4bffde29c96c31961b68e96.png)

---

With **ItemIndicator**, elevate your Minecraft experience to new heights. Whether you're a meticulous organizer or just looking for a bit more convenience, this mod has got you covered. Download now and start playing smarter, not harder!
